content:
Hello! Does the new UI (handbook) change anything in the Source Sheet or is it just new keys? I'm currently working on the translation of the UI (PanelText) in French so if possible I would like to avoid working on keys that'll soon be changed (I'm guessing some keys are probably not used anymore which is fine, I'm just worried about sending a translation that isn't accurate anymore because the key is used for something else and I didn't notice the change or something) <:karen_nervous:1408324291237511259> 
(I don't know if I should @ someone in this message, I don't want to sound impatient, I know Mori's staff is swamped rn <:aurita_beg2:1407642015428116541>)
